body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content

- Adds python dependencies explicitly to release a version of the package.
title: Add python dependencies

body:
# PULL REQUEST

Add Pkg dependency, necessary when using `deps/build.jl`. Follows https://github.com/JuliaClimate/ClimateTools.jl/blob/master/Project.toml#L23 and the error message from the JuliaRegistry.
title: Add Pkg dependency

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Distributions` package from `0.24` to `0.24, 0.25`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Distributions to 0.25, (keep existing compat)
